name: 家族傳承情感型
description: 透過後代祭祖的場景，將個人故事上升為家族傳承的史詩感。小孫女對著畫像說話，連接過去與未來，給整個故事一個超越時間的意義。

examples.drama_title: 💔Reborn! Family listened to my inner thoughts, scheming girl cry!#chinesedrama
examples.excerpt: Back then, it was because my aunt gave us a child. / That's why your mother came into being. / Why is my aunt in the painting? / That's because your aunt is a fairy! / We've been able to live so well all these years / Thanks to your aunt's blessing
